name: Betty Carter's Double Pecan Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Beat eggs until blended, add sugar, syrup, and salt. Mix thoroughly.
Stir in butter.
3. Place 1 cup of pecans in each pie shell. Pour the liquid mixture equally over
each.
4. Put pies on a cookie sheet on the middle rack of the oven. Bake for 10
minutes. Lower temperature to 300°F and continue baking until filling is firm,
about 30 minutes.
